name: ram-prices
title: RAM Prices
description: Track DDR4 and DDR5 market pricing from RamRadar.
author: alexi.build

commands.name: show-market-trends
commands.title: Show Market Trends
commands.description: Browse DDR4 and DDR5 market trends.

commands.name: market-trends-menu-bar
commands.title: Market Trends Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: RAM Prices
commands.description: Show DDR4 and DDR5 prices in the menu bar.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
